steps.title: Identify the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is “her writing,” which is singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A verb must agree with its subject in number. Since the subject is singular, the verb must be singular. “Has been” is the only singular option, making it correct. The other three are all plural, violating subject-verb agreement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
